## Definition of Done checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the linked issue are met
- [ ] All required CI checks are green
- [ ] `dist/` is updated and committed (if build output changed)
- [ ] README or docs updated (if config surface or user-visible behavior changed)
- [ ] Reason codes and prescriptive messages present for new WARN/FAIL/SKIPPED paths
- [ ] Output JSON shape is backward compatible (or change is intentionally versioned)
- [ ] No scope creep beyond the linked issue

## Test coverage

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Golden snapshot tests (explain changes if snapshots updated)
- [ ] Integration tests (mocked API)
- [ ] Fuzz tests (if parser changes)
- [ ] Matrix stress tests (if keying changes)
